name: Kodi Bridge
description: Always-on Composio access, dual communication with Kodi, autonomy enforcement, plugin self-update, and the Org Memory module — all in one plugin loaded into every Kodi-managed OpenClaw instance.

instance_id.description: UUID of this OpenClaw instance row in Kodi's database.

org_id.description: UUID of the Kodi organization that owns this instance.

kodi_api_base_url.description: Base URL of the Kodi API (e.g. https://api.kodi.so) the plugin calls for events, memory, approvals, and bundle updates.

hmac_secret.description: Shared HMAC secret used to sign requests in both directions. Provisioned in cloud-init via SecretRef.

heartbeat_interval_seconds.description: How often the plugin emits a heartbeat event to Kodi.

bundle_check_interval_seconds.description: How often the updater module polls Kodi for a new plugin version.

outbox_path.description: Directory for the disk-backed outbox of failed-to-send events. Defaults to <state>/kodi-bridge/outbox.
